family.name: NGFS
family.source: Network for Greening the Financial System
family.description: NGFS Phase V climate scenarios used by 140+ central banks for climate stress testing

scenarios.name: Net Zero 2050
scenarios.description: Early, coordinated policy. Low transition + physical risk. Gradual carbon price increase.

scenarios.name: Below 2°C
scenarios.description: Moderate early action. Carbon price rises steadily. Technology change moderate-to-fast.

scenarios.name: Divergent Net Zero
scenarios.description: Reaches 1.5°C but with higher transition risk. Divergent policies across sectors/regions.

scenarios.name: Delayed Transition
scenarios.description: No emission reduction until 2030, then sharp policy action. Very high carbon prices after 2030.

scenarios.name: Nationally Determined Contributions (NDCs)
scenarios.description: Only current NDC pledges implemented. Low transition risk but severe physical risk.

scenarios.name: Current Policies
scenarios.description: Only existing policies. Minimal transition risk but catastrophic physical risk.
